{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Phoenix Height
| introduced = cradle-02-soulsmith
}}

== Soulsmith ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Phoenix Height]] is a location mentioned in relation to the number of [[Path]] manuals.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c8">''Soulsmith'', chapter 8</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
